_comment: Recommended PreToolUse hook wiring for apexyard/safety-hooks. Copy the entries inside hooks.PreToolUse into your project's .claude/settings.json (your file already exists; you're appending to its hooks.PreToolUse array). All hooks use Bash matcher pattern matching — the wrapper exits 0 (no-op) when the bash command doesn't match the hook's interest. Order matters: secrets first (kills the most damaging leak), then git-add-all (catches the over-broad stage), then commit refs, then push gate, then PR/branch validation.
